parsed.production_notes: The video is entirely composed of static AI-generated images with only the mouths and eyes animated. The lighting is overly dramatic, and the robot's design features typical AI artifacts and uncanny stillness.

characters.appearance: Humanoid robot with a white, segmented face and body, exposing mechanical joints at the neck and shoulders. It has dark, hollow-looking eyes.
Young Indian man, medium build, brown complexion, short dark hair, light beard and mustache.

scenes.setting: Two separate beds viewed from above, one blue and one beige, with nightstands, dim lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A top-down view of a humanoid robot lying in a bed. The robot has a white, segmented face and body with visible mechanical joints. It is resting on a dark blue pillow and covered by a dark blue blanket, with its hands clasped over its stomach. A book is visible on a nightstand next to the bed. The lighting is dim and moody.

A top-down view of a young man lying in a bed. He has short dark hair and a light beard, and is wearing a dark blue t-shirt. He is resting on a beige pillow and covered by a beige blanket, with his hands clasped over his stomach. A small lamp and a book are visible on a nightstand next to the bed. The lighting is warm and dim.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen view from above showing a robot and a man lying in separate beds. The robot is on the left in a blue bed, the man on the right in a beige bed. Various text overlays and graphics pop up as they speak.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀಯಾ [What are you doing?]
Character B says: I sleeping.
Character A says: I am sleeping ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ ಫಾರ್ಮಲ್ ಆಗಿ I am getting some sleep ಅಂತ ಕೂಡ ಹೇಳ್ಬಹುದು. [You should say 'I am sleeping'. You can also say 'I am getting some sleep' a bit more formally.]
Character B says: ಓ ಹೌದಾ, ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು? [Oh is it, how to learn English?]
Character A says: ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ 15 minutes daily practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು. ಒಂದು ತಿಂಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಬಹುದು. [It's enough if you practice with me daily for 15 minutes. You can learn English in one month.]
Character B says: ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಖರ್ಚಾಗುತ್ತಾ? [Will this cost a lot?]
Character A says: ಕೇವಲ ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿಗೆ ಈ ಆಪ್ ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. ಒಂದು ಕೋಟಿ ಜನ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿತಾ ಇದ್ದಾರೆ. [You can try this app completely for just one rupee. One crore people are learning English with me.]
Character B says: ಸೂಪರ್, ಹೇಗೆ ಜಾಯಿನ್ ಆಗೋದು? [Super, how to join?]
scenes.on_screen_text: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀಯಾ (What are you doing) SLEEPING ಅಂತ (like) ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ (a little) ಫಾರ್ಮಲ್ (formal) ಆಗಿ (as) SOME SLEEP ಕೂಡ (also) ಹೇಳ್ಬಹುದು (can say) ಓ ಹೌದಾ (Oh is it) ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ (English) ಹೇಗೆ (how) ಕಲಿಬೇಕು (to learn) ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ (Daily with me) 15 Minutes DAILY PRACTICE ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು (is enough) 1 Month ENGLISH ಕಲಿಯಬಹುದು (can learn) ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ (For this a lot) ಖರ್ಚು ಆಗುತ್ತಾ (will it cost) 1 Rupee Only ಈ (this) ಆಪ್ (app) ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ (completely) ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು (can try) 1 CRORES+ PEOPLE ನನ್ನ (my) ಜೊತೆ (with) ಕಲಿಯುತ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ (are learning) ಸೂಪರ್ (Super) ಹೇಗೆ (how) ಜಾಯಿನ್ ಆಗೋದು (to join)

panels.panel_visual_description: A digital interface showing a mobile application store page. The layout includes a header area, a download progress indicator, and various sections for app details and reviews.

scenes.visual_description: A screencast of a mobile app store interface showing an app download in progress. The screen displays standard app store elements like a download progress indicator and review sections.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: ಈಗಲೇ MySivi ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ, [Download the MySivi app right now,]
scenes.on_screen_text: MySivi AI English Speaking App MySivi AI In-app purchases Install Cancel Open What's new Last updated Feb 23, 2026 Rate this app App support

panels.panel_visual_description: A 3D mockup of a smartphone standing upright against a plain, light-colored background. The phone screen is blank. A subtle shadow is cast by the phone onto the surface below.
